name: Barbecued Spareribs/cp
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Hickory smoke salt (or liquid smoke and salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place spareribs on a rack in a baking pan.
2. Brown the ribs in a 400 degree oven for 15 minutes; turn and brown on the other side for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Drain any excess fat from the ribs.
4. Transfer the ribs to a crock pot.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients (vinegar, catsup, salt, brown sugar, hickory smoke salt or liquid smoke and salt, steak sauce, and minced onion) in a bowl until well mixed.
6. Pour the mixture over the ribs in the crock pot.
7. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
Makes 5 to 6 servings.
